privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating three winter inventory items in Copper POS with specific original prices ($45.00, $30.00, $50.00), then updating their names to append ' [CLEARANCE]' and reducing prices to 50% of original values ($22.50, $15.00, $25.00 respectively). The inventory must be exported to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\inventory_audit.csv. All metadata claims regarding item names, prices, and export path have been verified as correct based on the task description and mathematical validation of the 50% price reduction calculations.
